headline: Monster Beverage Corp (NASDAQ:MNST) Passes Trend Template and High Growth Momentum Screens
summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) passes the Minervini Trend Template and High Growth Momentum screen, showing strong uptrends and accelerating earnings for growth-focused investors.
